title: The do-while Loop
description: Execute code at least once, then repeat while condition is true.

slides.title: do-while: Guaranteed at Least Once
do-while Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$i = 1;
do {
    echo "i is $i\n";
    $i++;
} while ($i <= 3);

$j = 10;
do {
    echo "This runs once.";
} while ($j < 5);
?>

quizData.explanation: The body runs once ($count becomes 1), then condition $count < 0 is false, so loop ends.
